tasks.label: NX-Cast: Upload
tasks.command: LOG_DIR="${workspaceFolder}/logs"; mkdir -p "$LOG_DIR"; LOG_STAMP="$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)"; SESSION_LOG="$LOG_DIR/run_nxlink-$LOG_STAMP.log"; NRO_PATH="${workspaceFolder}/NX-Cast.nro"; NXLINK_PREFIX=(); if command -v stdbuf >/dev/null 2>&1; then NXLINK_PREFIX=(stdbuf -oL -eL); fi; if [ ! -f "$NRO_PATH" ]; then echo "[run-nxlink] NRO not found: $NRO_PATH" >&2; exit 1; fi; echo "[run-nxlink] session_log=$SESSION_LOG"; set +e; if [ -n "${input:switchIp}" ]; then echo "[run-nxlink] target=${input:switchIp} mode=upload"; "${NXLINK_PREFIX[@]}" nxlink -a "${input:switchIp}" "$NRO_PATH" 2>&1 | tee "$SESSION_LOG"; else "${NXLINK_PREFIX[@]}" nxlink "$NRO_PATH" 2>&1 | tee "$SESSION_LOG"; fi; nxlink_status=${PIPESTATUS[0]}; set -e; if [ "$nxlink_status" -ne 0 ]; then echo "[run-nxlink] nxlink exited with status $nxlink_status"; fi; exit "$nxlink_status"

tasks.label: NX-Cast: Upload + nxlink server
tasks.command: LOG_DIR="${workspaceFolder}/logs"; mkdir -p "$LOG_DIR"; LOG_STAMP="$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)"; SESSION_LOG="$LOG_DIR/run_nxlink-$LOG_STAMP.log"; NRO_PATH="${workspaceFolder}/NX-Cast.nro"; NXLINK_PREFIX=(); if command -v stdbuf >/dev/null 2>&1; then NXLINK_PREFIX=(stdbuf -oL -eL); fi; if [ ! -f "$NRO_PATH" ]; then echo "[run-nxlink] NRO not found: $NRO_PATH" >&2; exit 1; fi; echo "[run-nxlink] session_log=$SESSION_LOG"; set +e; if [ -n "${input:switchIp}" ]; then echo "[run-nxlink] target=${input:switchIp} mode=server"; "${NXLINK_PREFIX[@]}" nxlink -a "${input:switchIp}" -s "$NRO_PATH" 2>&1 | tee "$SESSION_LOG"; else "${NXLINK_PREFIX[@]}" nxlink -s "$NRO_PATH" 2>&1 | tee "$SESSION_LOG"; fi; nxlink_status=${PIPESTATUS[0]}; set -e; if [ "$nxlink_status" -ne 0 ]; then echo "[run-nxlink] nxlink exited with status $nxlink_status"; fi; exit "$nxlink_status"

inputs.description: Nintendo Switch IP address (leave empty to omit -a)
Parallel build jobs passed to make -j
